feed.title: Errant Thinking - Dark Souls
feed.subtitle: Asking insightful questions. Seeking thoughtful answers.

entry.title: Woland: The Silver Cradle
entry.summary: William of "Half a Worm and a Bitten Apple" is hosting a community event to collaboratively create a realm called "Woland", where 20 people create small regions within a hex map for a Mythic Bastionland game. My turn has arrived and I chose the center hex flower numbered 11, which happened to feature the Seat of Power of the realm! I endeavored to create a Holding worthy of being a Seat of Power of legend! I hope you like Berserk.
